name: milepilot
description: MilePilot — business mileage tracking (web PWA + Expo native shell)

scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:www && npx cap sync && node scripts/patch-android-permissions.js && node scripts/patch-ios-permissions.js
scripts.android:open: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.ios:open: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.android:assemble: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.postinstall: node scripts/patch-android-permissions.js 2>/dev/null || true; node scripts/patch-ios-permissions.js 2>/dev/null || true
